Text: Staff Sofia is very polite and good service . Only the cleanliness need to improve
entrance and hallways need better lighting.

Nice apartment with amazing skyline views of KL city, acceptable walking distance to city centre (15 mins) and Jalan Alor food street. Near to good cafes and local eateries such as grumpy bagels and yum yum foodie street. Shower drain seems clogged as water flow was quite slow with ponding while showering, but otherwise overall clean and tidy for an apartment without daily room service. Very responsive as well to any queries and additional towels we need.

Pros: 1. Clean room 2. Huge enough bathtub for 3 kids to enjoy 3. Accessible location to train station 4. Staffs on WhatsApp replied promptly to feedback and tried to rectify some issues. 5. Functioning washer dryer 6. Comfortable pillows, clean towels Cons: 1. Front desk lady needs to smile more. Her stressful face was evident. 2. Staff nailed down the master room toilet door as it's faulty thus toilet door can't be locked. 3. Bathtub was choked thus took a while for water to filter out. 4. Water heater can only be used if you use less water. 5. Sofa was without back support so it was uncomfortable to sit for long. 6. King bed was hard
When the company employed a foreigner as a frontrunner, we looked not good for Malaysia's image as a country full of respect and appreciation for others.
Everything good and suitable with the price -Sabrina
Naim helped me a lot

I was supposed to get a deluxe room, but when I wanted to check in, the hotel staff told me there was a problem with the deluxe room and I was given a standard room. they said tomorrow we can move the room, but when I asked the morning shift staff about this, she didn't seem to know anything. I am very dissatisfied with the service provided. the standard room is very narrow and I don't think it's worth the price given. I will not promote this hotel to anyone.

Just book a small room for my self to spend the after attending class during day. No tv, 1 iron to share at level G but the staff didnt understand me when I ask about the iron. I go look my self. Before leave the room make sure the door is properly locked. Some strangers try to break into my room at 3 am during sleep.

We had a pleasant stay overall. It would be wonderful if a washing machine could be provided in the room for added convenience. Some of the decorative items are fixed to the tables and side tables, which limits their functionality. In addition, a comfortable sofa or dedicated seating area would greatly enhance the guest experience and provide a perfect place to sit back and enjoy the beautiful surroundings.
the staff was trying to scam me by ordering fake grab car when I have already gave her the money the room is so small you wouldn’t able to breath

Very disappointing stay. The hotel is poorly maintained and urgently needs renovation. The bathroom door would not close properly, the window could not be opened, and no water bottles were provided. The carpet was dirty, and the breakfast selection was extremely limited. Overall, the property feels neglected and does not meet basic hospitality standards.
Never prefer the property

Where do i start? Let me start with the check in process. It was haywire.. This is not a hotel but a residence. Firstly, i was not informed that we cannot check in at the check in counter. Instead we had to go look for the agent (who apparently, when we arrived had gone for lunch) we had to wait for the agent for 20 minutes to check in!!! Then the check out process is another haywire thing. We were not aware that you cannot bring 2 cars (nothing written in the terms and condition) . Only at check in my husband were told and by then we already came here in 2 cars and too late to plan our arrival for only 1 car. Pls be aware that the parking here, cost me another RM32.00.
First day arrived, welcome by mosquito. We have to buy the mosquito repellent from KK mart downstairs

This hotel is really not in the city of Bukit Bintang..everything is close by..but it is not suitable for families..because the rooms are small even if they are for families..for solo/couples/couples or just a stopover is okay...btw staff, cleanliness..everything is good..the hotel is comfortable..recommended if you want a budget hotel..booking through agoda can be very cheap..hehehe

The staff (Hasan) was so rude. Upon checking out I knew this was only an apartment (BNB) and not the hotel. This explains the bed bugs, lizard and cockroach inside the room. Amazingly, The staff was asking for photos of these insects when I reported it. How could I even take a photo of it when I would immediately scream if I see these insects?! How could I take photo of bed bugs when even a naked eye can't see it? It was totally horrible experience, 51st floor smells like athlete's foot due to the wet carpet. I have no issues with BNB, but atleast I am expecting the staff to have even a bit of customer service!

[SCAM ALERT!!!] Everything was fine until when we want to drive out from the car park. The access card was not working, and the management asked us to pay RM100 to open the gate for us, which they said they will refund us after the investigation. However, a few weeks passed, and they refused to refund us the RM100 falsely accusing us for accessing the car park with the TNG card. When we said we want to check the cctv, they said we need to be accompanied by a police to see the cctv. So, we should just buy an air tickets go back to Malaysia so we can have police to accompany us to see the cctv footage? We 100% confirmed that we didn't use any TNG card to access the card park as we don't have the TNG card! This is SCAM, be careful all travelers to KL.

According to the out door parking charges table I received, the fee is RM10 for the first 8 hours, and RM3 for every additional hour. I parked from 10:00 PM until 9:18 AM the next morning, which is a total of 11 hours. Based on the stated charges, the total should be RM19.00 (RM10 for the first 8 hours + RM9 for the additional 3 hours). However, customer service charged me RM26.00. I was informed that after 12:00 AM, the charges reset for another 8-hour block, but this condition was not stated or declared in the parking charge schedule provided.
Everything is okay except the room and toilet is super tiny.
Room was cheap and value for money. Approachable and friendly staff sabrina. Close to many tourist spots and food spots. Very convenient and accessible.

Suitable for solo travelers with a low budget and lively location. The hotel location is a bit difficult to find even with Google Maps. In my room, I found that the TV was broken, and the toilet couldn’t flush fully, causing waste to stagnate. Overall, it’s low-budget and the location is excellent. The location is great but the queue for the lifts was super long! There's 3 lifts but only 2 lifts were working. Locating the block after collecting the keys was confusing especially the lift key instructions. Grab drop offs weren't even allowed to drop inside the block. Shower drained kept clogging and there's a weird smell in the rooms and toilet. Check-in experience was annoying since they informed me that it got delayed more than 2 hours due to heavy cleaning day. I had to call them a couple of times to be sure my room was ready for check-in.
For the solo travellers it’s a good choice and am cordially thankful to Raisha, who’s so friendly and informative for my trip
The room bedroom comfort but there is not hot water for shower in my room. Kindly have a check any problem on hot water system. Next time will be choosing this accommodation. Thank you.

Please improve the overall cleanliness, tidiness, facility readiness, room odour, and guest hospitality. I had high expectations for the room, but it turned out to be quite disappointing. The cleanliness and smell were poor upon arrival, causing us to sneeze frequently, and our children felt uncomfortable throughout the stay. Additionally, the elevators nearest to our room were not functioning, forcing us to walk a considerable distance while carrying heavy bags during check-out. The staff were also not particularly welcoming or friendly upon our arrival. Based on this experience, I would not consider staying here again for future vacations.
Room very small

on the day that i was supposed to check in, i was informed that it might be delayed due to housekeeping, that affected my plan for the day honestly, and the next day when me and my friend wanted to go out we were faced with an elevator jam, a lot of people from our floor were waiting for their turns, we asked a family how long were they waiting and they told us it was more than half an hour, and so we decided to take the stairs FROM THE 35th FLOOR, as we do not want to waste our time waiting. Please do something about the lifts, its worse to deal with this during the holidays. Other than that, minor issue but its still an issue nonetheless; we cant watch netflix due to high traffic since i guess everyone is also using it? so please dont be cheap and make more accounts, also the shower drain takes so long to drain the water it only needs a minute for the shower place to flood. PLEASE FIX ALL OF THESE, thank you.

Swing & Pillows was a great place to stay, for the most part it was clean, they could maybe get newer fresher towels. But the room itself was clean and just what I needed. Also Sofia at the front desk is very nice & helpful!

I rented a place for my elderly parents to stay for five days and four nights. As soon as we entered the room, there was a musty smell, and the pillows had a strong sweaty odor. I immediately went to the front desk for assistance, and they quickly sent someone to change the pillows and provided me with an air freshener spray. However, I think even a high-end hotel should pay attention to pillow replacement, as this is a very dirty issue. Furthermore, the hotel provides the pool, gym, and breakfast at a different location, which is quite inconvenient.

Worth for money, most are provided, even hair dryer, iron n ironing board, but iron not working. No tea/coffee bags. Room is clean. Have 24 hours mini mart and restaurants downstairs.

Convenient location, cosy apartment, but lacking the finishing touches - only two very thin towels provided, and you can only exchange them during the day; pool was not very clean; almost always a long wait for the elevator; not even basic tea and coffee-making facilities provided in the kitchenette.

Could be trouble for those who are sensitive to noise like me. Sound proofing is not satisfactory. Staff is in general kind. Change room for me due to some issue with room. Appreciate that.
I want is Japanese style but given to me not as I dream

We booked the Executive 2-Bedroom. Apartment and had a wonderful stay. The unit came with two bedrooms and two bathrooms, with one bedroom having an attached bathroom. This was my first apartment-style stay experience, and it definitely exceeded my expectations. The apartment was located on the 33rd floor at Block A, and the check-in process was smooth. We collected our keys from the designated check-in counter, and although check-in and check-out were self-service, the staff were friendly and helpful whenever assistance was needed. One of the biggest advantages of this property is its location. TRX Mall is only about a 5-minute walk away. Within just a few minutes’ walk, there are plenty of food options including Chinese restaurants, mamak eateries, durian stalls, and even a McDonald’s nearby. Getting a Grab was also very easy and convenient. The apartment itself was very new, clean, and comfortable. The air-conditioning worked perfectly, and I especially liked that we could adjust the room temperature to our preference. The unit was well-equipped with kitchen utensils, including knives, scissors, and other essentials. There was also a washing machine available for guests who wish to do laundry. Netflix was provided in the living room, which was a nice bonus. There were no TVs in the bedrooms, but that wasn’t an issue for us. The only minor things to note are that facial tissues and laundry detergent were not provided, so it would be good to bring your own if needed. Overall, this was an excellent stay. The apartment was clean, comfortable, well-located, and great value for money. I would definitely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting the TRX area.

1. The room is really a budget hotel. But with the price charged, my expectations go down when I get a room with a small size and a bathroom like that. 2. Bed size for tall people is not suitable. But still ready to sleep. 3. Television cannot function. 4. wi fi is very weak. Mobile data is low near the room, just expect wi fi but the connection is very weak. 5. Open parking is quite far away. Visitors have to walk a bit. 6. Close to other attractions, can walk. 7. The room door is not soundproof. Feeling insecure with people passing by in front of the room.

This has to be one of the most disgusting place I've seen. Mold in wall, pillows that smell horrendous, sink that's clogged. Truly unhabitable for any person western. Never again will I book this place.

I arrived at the hotel early in the morning and set the wrong date due to my personal operation. I asked if I could change the date so that I could check in today. The hotel staff refused my request to change the date and no refund could be given. I negotiated with agoda, and agoda said it could only refund part of it to me. In the end, it did not refund my money. I had to pay the price for two nights. This store is very rogue in this regard

The moment I opened the door, two cockroaches are welcoming me. OMG!

STAY AWAY! It will ruin your holidays! We had an awful experience at Deface Platinum in Kuala Lumpur. When we first arrived, the check-in process took almost two hours! It was so frustrating, and when we finally got to our room, it was infested with bed bugs. We immediately informed the staff, but instead of helping us right away, they told us we’d have to wait until the next day for a room change. This is completely unacceptable, especially considering there were also ants all over the apartment. To make things worse, the hotel demanded a hefty 500 RM deposit, which they promised to return within 30 business days after the stay. That’s an incredibly long time to wait for a refund! On top of that, we were four people, yet they only gave us one key to the entire apartment. How is that even possible? The pool area was always overcrowded, and there are restricted times to access it, requiring you to have a key to get in. This place really needs to rethink their service and facilities. I would not recommend this hotel to anyone, as my experience was nothing short of a disaster.
Booked four rooms for three night. Quite okay. Decent enough to sleep in. You get what you pay. Chosen this because it is near our event’s location.
